content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
428 J Street • Suite 620 • Sacramento, CA 95814-2329
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886

September 1, 2004

Christopher E. Skinnell
Nielsen, Merksamser, Parrinello,
Mueller & Naylor, LLP
591 Redwood Highway, #4000
Mill Valley, CA 94941-3039

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-04-146

Dear Mr. Skinnell:

This letter confirms the receipt of your June 28, 2004, request for advice regarding an unnamed Morgan Hill city council member and a potential conflict of interest. Under the provisions of California Code of Regulations section 18329(b)(8)(B), unless the council member has authorized you as his or her representative, the Fair Political Practices Commission cannot address your questions or provide analysis. I enclose a copy of regulation 18329 for your review.

If you believe a violation of the Political Reform Act has occurred, you may file the enclosed complaint form with our Enforcement Division.

Should you have any additional questions regarding this matter, please contact the Commission at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: William D. Lenkeit
Counsel, Legal Division

Enclosure
WJL:jg
